jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Hopscotch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
